title: Satellite images capture 33 IRGC fast-attack fleet near Kargan coast in Hormuz
snippet: Sentinel-2 satellite image captured April 22 shows flotilla of 33 IRGCN fast-attack craft north of Hormuz near Kargan coast. Show-of-force deployment enforcing strait closure. 'Mosquito fleet' visible as cluster of wakes. Same day as MSC-Francesca and Epaminondas seizures. European Copernicus system imagery.
tag_reason: New satellite intelligence: first imagery of IRGC fast-boat swarm in Hormuz. Contradicts Trump's claim of Iranian navy destroyed.
